recommendations.title: White Wedding
recommendations.overview: A philosophy professor has an illicit affair with one of his students, a bright yet troubled girl who lives alone.

recommendations.title: Free Fall

recommendations.title: Let Her Kill You

recommendations.title: C.R.A.Z.Y.
recommendations.overview: A young French Canadian, one of five boys in a conservative family in the 1960s and 1970s, struggles to reconcile his emerging identity with his father's values.

recommendations.title: A View of Love
recommendations.overview: Happily married with a daughter, Marc is a successful real estate agent in Aix-en-Provence. One day, he has an appointment with a woman to view a traditional country house. A few hours later, Marc finally puts a name to her face. It's Cathy, the girl

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: My Rainy Days
recommendations.overview: Because of her past, 17-year-old Rio lives her days filling the emptiness in her heart with money—until one day, she meets a university professor named Kouki and falls in love.

recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Realive

recommendations.title: Shéhérazade
recommendations.overview: Zachary, 17 years old, gets out of jail. Rejected by his mother, he hangs out in the mean streets of Marseille. He falls in love with Shéhérazade, a young prostitute of whom he becomes the pimp without realizing it...
